title: Fix non-working OTP login flow

requirements.text: Debug and fix the OTP login flow end-to-end: verify that clicking Send OTP triggers the backend sendOTP method, displays appropriate loading state, and shows the OTP verification screen upon success
acceptanceCriteria: Send OTP button triggers backend sendOTP call with mobile number
Loading state displays while backend request is in progress
OTP verification screen appears after successful OTP send
Error messages display if sendOTP fails

requirements.text: Verify OTP verification flow: ensure that entering a valid 6-digit OTP and clicking Verify & Login calls the backend verifyOTP method, authenticates the user, and redirects to the dashboard for existing users
acceptanceCriteria: Verify & Login button triggers backend verifyOTP call with mobile number and OTP code
Loading state displays during verification
Successful verification redirects existing users to dashboard
Invalid OTP shows error message without redirecting

requirements.text: Verify new user signup flow: ensure that after successful OTP verification for a new mobile number, the signup form appears with Full Name and Class/Course fields, and submitting creates the user profile and redirects to dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: New users see signup form after OTP verification
Signup form submission creates user profile with provided details
Successful signup redirects to dashboard
Authentication state persists after signup

requirements.text: Ensure useOTPAuth hook properly integrates with backend actor methods (sendOTP and verifyOTP) and maintains authentication state across page refreshes using localStorage
acceptanceCriteria: useOTPAuth hook calls backend sendOTP and verifyOTP methods via useActor
Authentication state (mobile number, isAuthenticated) persists in localStorage
App.tsx route protection correctly reads authentication state from useOTPAuth
Logout clears authentication state from localStorage

requirements.text: Verify backend sendOTP method generates a 6-digit OTP for the provided mobile number, stores it with a 5-minute expiration timestamp, and returns success status
acceptanceCriteria: sendOTP accepts a 10-digit mobile number as Text
Generates a 6-digit OTP code
Stores OTP with mobile number and expiration timestamp (5 minutes from generation)
Returns success response indicating OTP was sent

requirements.text: Verify backend verifyOTP method validates the provided OTP against stored data, checks expiration, determines if the mobile number is a new or existing user, and returns appropriate authentication status with user information
acceptanceCriteria: verifyOTP accepts mobile number and OTP code as Text
Validates OTP matches stored code for the mobile number
Checks OTP has not expired (within 5 minutes of generation)
Returns authentication success with isNewUser flag and user principal/ID
Returns error for invalid or expired OTP

constraints: Do not modify the single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo

Do not edit immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Maintain OTP-based authentication system; do not reintroduce Internet Identity
nonGoals: Implementing actual SMS delivery for OTP codes
Redesigning the LoginPage UI beyond fixing functionality
